source:
%%sql

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW odw_curated_db.vw_Entraid_curated_mipins

AS

SELECT DISTINCT 
CAST(EI.EmployeeEntraId as INT)             AS EmployeeEntraId,
EI.ID                                        AS ID,
CAST(EI.employeeId AS INT)                  AS EmployeeID,
EI.givenName                                AS GivenName,
EI.surname                                  AS Surname,
EI.userPrincipalName                        AS UserPrincipalName,              
EI.Migrated                                 AS Migrated,
EI.ODTSourceSystem                          AS ODTSourceSystem,
EI.SourceSystemID                           AS SourceSystemID,
EI.IngestionDate                            AS IngestionDate,
EI.ValidTo                                  AS ValidTo,
EI.RowID                                    AS RowID,
EI.IsActive                                 AS IsActive
FROM odw_harmonised_db.entraid AS EI
    Where  (EI.ingestionDate IS NULL OR EI.ingestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    AND     (EI.validTo IS NULL OR EI.validTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

view_df = spark.sql(
    "SELECT * FROM odw_curated_db.vw_entraid_curated_mipins"
)

table_name = 'odw_curated_db.entraid_curated_mipins'

df_table_path = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE EXTENDED {table_name}")
table_path = (
    df_table_path
    .where("col_name == 'Location'")
    .select("data_type")
    .collect()[0][0]
)

view_df.write \
    .format("parquet") \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .option("path", table_path) \
    .saveAsTable(table_name)
